The '''''Spectre''''' was a [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] that was part of the [[Lumiya's fleet|fleet]] commanded by [[Lumiya]] shortly after the [[Battle of Saijo]]. It was capable of carrying twenty-four [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighters]].<ref name="Lumiya: Dark Star of the Empire" />

{{Ship-stub}}
